name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
description: Free LPG connection to women of BPL families

additional_rules: Must be adult woman belonging to BPL household
No other LPG connection in same household

benefit_description: ₹1,600 free LPG connection + ₹1,600 refill subsidy per year under Ujjwala 2.0

deep_eligibility_questions.question: Does anyone in your household already have an LPG gas connection?
